items.description: Stable ModelServer management API permission identifier.
items.title: Permission

code.description: OAuth authorization code returned by the provider.

state.description: OAuth state parameter. May carry a Hydra return_to encoded as "<random>|<url>".

items.description: Stable ModelServer management API permission identifier.
items.title: Permission

refresh_token.description: Refresh token issued by a prior login.

enabled.description: Enable or disable extra usage for this project.

info.description: Typed management API used by the ModelServer dashboard. Proxy/LLM compatibility endpoints are intentionally excluded.
info.title: ModelServer Management API

get.description: Returns paginated notifications with optional filtering by audience type and include_deleted flag.

post.description: Creates a new notification. Returns 200 (legacy wire quirk, not 201).

delete.description: Soft-deletes a notification. Returns 200 with {data:{deleted:true}} (legacy wire quirk, not 204).

get.description: Returns a single notification by ID.

put.description: Updates an existing notification by ID.

get.summary: Get HTTP log for a request

get.description: Returns the public OAuth provider and login-page configuration.
Generates a state token and emits a 302 redirect to the provider's authorize URL.

parameters.description: Optional Hydra login return URL. Only /oauth/login-prefixed values are honored.
parameters.name: return_to

schema.description: Optional Hydra login return URL. Only /oauth/login-prefixed values are honored.

parameters.description: Forwarded protocol scheme from reverse proxy.
parameters.name: X-Forwarded-Proto

schema.description: Forwarded protocol scheme from reverse proxy.

get.description: Returns stable system-scoped permission identifiers granted to the current user.
Returns the paginated notification inbox for the current user.

post.description: Marks all visible notifications as read for the current user.

get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications for the current user.

post.description: Marks a single notification as read. Returns 200 even when the notification is unknown or deleted (silent 200 contract).

parameters.description: Number of plans returned per page.
parameters.name: per_page

schema.description: Number of plans returned per page.

get.description: Lists non-archived projects visible to the current user.

parameters.description: Number of projects returned per page.
parameters.name: per_page

schema.description: Number of projects returned per page.

get.description: Returns the current user's role and stable permission identifiers for a project.

parameters.description: Filter by transaction type (topup, deduction, refund, adjust).
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Filter by transaction type (topup, deduction, refund, adjust).

parameters.description: Number of users returned per page.
parameters.name: per_page

schema.description: Number of users returned per page.

get.description: Returns every user in a compact shape for management filters.
